title: Fix deployment error preventing production launch

requirements.text: Diagnose and resolve the deployment error that is preventing Version 6 from being deployed to production successfully
acceptanceCriteria: All existing functionality (products, cart, Stripe payments, admin) remains operational after deployment

requirements.text: Verify that the Stripe payment integration works correctly in the production environment after deployment
acceptanceCriteria: Users can initiate checkout sessions in production
Payment success and failure callbacks work as expected

constraints: Maintain backward compatibility with existing state data during deployment
Preserve all existing features: product management, cart, user profiles, and admin access control
Do not change the frontend routing or component structure
nonGoals: Modifying the Stripe payment flow beyond fixing deployment issues
